mapper.select: select s.id as step_id, s.pipeline_instance_id, s.step_code, s.stage_code, s.step_status, pr.processed_count as rows_processed, null::bigint as total_rows_hint, pr.updated_at as last_heartbeat_at from batch.pipeline_step_run s join batch.pipeline_instance p on p.id = s.pipeline_instance_id left join batch.pipeline_progress pr on pr.tenant_id = p.tenant_id and pr.pipeline_instance_id = s.pipeline_instance_id and pr.stage = s.stage_code where p.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and s.pipeline_instance_id = #{pipelineInstanceId} order by s.run_seq asc, s.id asc

select p.file_id as file_id, fr.file_name as file_name from batch.pipeline_instance p left join batch.file_record fr on fr.id = p.file_id where p.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and p.id = #{pipelineInstanceId}

select jp.worker_code from batch.pipeline_instance p join batch.job_instance ji on ji.id = p.related_job_instance_id join batch.job_partition jp on jp.job_instance_id = ji.id where p.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and p.id = #{pipelineInstanceId} and jp.partition_status in ('RUNNING', 'RETRYING') and jp.worker_code is not null order by jp.updated_at desc, jp.id desc limit 1
